chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No. S- 118 of 2022 Kaloo Khan Laghari ------------------- Petitioner VERSUS Province of Sindh & others ----------------- Respondents Dates of hearing: 22.08.2022 Date of decision: 22.08.2022 None present O R D E R ADNAN-UL-KARIM MEMON, J-. Through the instant petition, the petitioner has prayed for legal protection and restraining order directing respondent No.4 to bound down private respondents 5 to 8 to maintain peace and not to cause him harassment. A perusal of record reflects that after filing the instant petition on 17.2.2022 neither the petitioner nor his counsel even appeared before the office to comply with the office objection. However, on 15.8.2022 when the matter was fixed before the court as an indulgence one week was granted due to the non-appearance of the petitioner and his counsel as for compliance of office objection. Today also neither the petitioner nor his counsel is in attendance which shows their lack of interest in the present petition. Accordingly, because of the above reasons, the instant petition is disposed of with a direction to the official respondents to act strictly under law as they are bound to provide legal protection to every citizen being their fundamental right. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
